name: educonnect-ai
description: EduConnect AI — SDG 4 Quality Education Platform. Full-stack MERN application with AI-powered study assistant.

scripts.dev: npm run server & npm run client
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
